arts.sum: A repeat of the 2010 Champions League final

arts.ttl: Five reasons why Inter can win Champions League
arts.sum: Leading Serie A journalist James Horncastle gives five reasons why Inter Milan can win the Champions League this season.

arts.ttl: Report: Inter Milan now want to sign 'brilliant' Liverpool player who signed new contract just six months ago
Bayern Munich vs. Inter Milan Predicted Lineups: Champions League Quarterfinals
arts.sum: Alphonso Davies, Jamal Musiala, Mehdi Taremi, Denzel Dumfries and Manuel Neuer are amongst the players that will miss the first leg of the Champions League quarterfinals between Bayern Munich and Inter Milan.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayern Munich’s Thomas Müller ready to put focus on Inter Milan match; Manchester United out on Xavi Simons; Jadon Sancho back to BVB?; Chelsea wants Jamie Gittens; Xabi Alonso to stay at Bayer Leverkusen?; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich legend Thomas Müller has been through a lot over the past week, but as he thanks fans for all of their support, he wanted to point everyone’s focus back toward Inter Milan as the Bavarians prepare for today’s match: Manchester United winger Jadon Sancho, who is on loan at Chelsea with an obligation to sign permanently for £25m in the summer, is keen to return to Borussia Dortmund, with Bundesliga rivals Bayer Leverkusen also interested.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Vincent Kompany holds deep respect for Inter Milan, Simone Inzaghi
arts.sum: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany holds a lot of respect for Inter Milan and Simone Inzaghi ahead of his team’s Champions League showdown with the Serie A powerhouse. Inter Milan in the Champions League?

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Inter Milan: Preview, Predictions, Lineups
arts.sum: Bayern Munich and Inter Milan will reignite their Champions League rivalry in the 2024-25 quarterfinals.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs Inter: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Bayern Munich take on Inter in the first leg of their Champions League quarter-final tie on Tuesday. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups and more.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Konrad Laimer acknowledges Inter Milan will be “one of the toughest opponents so far”
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s Konrad Laimer is ready to face Inter Milan in the Champions League, but knows that it will not be an easy task. I would be happy for anyone who has that one moment tomorrow or in the return leg to help us,” Laimer said.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Loan Works: Bayern Munich loanee Mathys Tel scores his first Premier League goal for Tottenham Hotspur
arts.sum: There are four players on loan in the German Bundesliga: Alexander Nübel, Franz Krätzig, Paul Wanner, and Armindo Sieb. Also, despite the limited playing time lately, Tel was able to get earn his first Premier League goal.
